name: Telegram Mini App workspace scaffold and bootstrap
description: Create the `apps/twa` workspace package, Vite/React SPA bootstrap, Telegram bridge initialization layer, env/docs wiring, and repo-tooling integration needed for a real TWA runtime.

planned: Add `apps/twa` as a separate workspace app instead of extending `apps/web`.
Lock one current Telegram Mini App SDK package line and document the choice in the execution plan.
Wire local HTTPS/tunnel and deploy expectations into repo scripts/docs without changing worker product semantics.

notes: This is the runtime starting point for the new client. No domain feature work should start before this scaffold exists.
